name: If I Bowed Down to Power, What's the Point in Living?

issues.description: Main effect is missing the conditional logic and the Blocker prevention action. The effect should check 'If you have 1 or less Life cards' and prevent opponent from activating [Blocker] during this turn when Leader attacks. Current DSL only has Rest action without the condition or blocker prevention.
Condition should be 'HasLifeCards' (1 or less) not 'Always'. The effect only applies when life ≤ 1.
Missing the core action that prevents opponent's [Blocker] activation. Only 'Rest' is present; need to add action preventing opponent blocker during this turn.
Duration context missing: effect applies 'during this turn' which means it should apply DuringYourTurn, not a permanent or end-of-turn effect.
